data.body: CONFIRMED root cause (via SSM into i-00880b2c7f13527c5, AWS-RunShellScript; journald evidence): the review-bot emits VOTER_ERROR with http_status=409 'change is closed' — it casts LLM-Review +1 on ABANDONED changes. Mechanism: src/rebar/review_bot/reconcile.py has NO open-status filter (_candidate_events :115-151, reconcile_once :194-207 only skip the dedup ledger or an existing vote); post_vote raises on the 409 (gerrit_client.py:252-253) and writes NO dedup row (:227), so the abandoned change is re-selected every pass forever. Amplifier: the review-bot compose service declares no volume (infra/compose/docker-compose.yml:74-91), so voted.db + reconcile_cursor live only in the ephemeral container layer -> every container recreation (auto-deploy, landed 07-03 / commit 479c3a57b) resets the cursor -> full events-log re-scan -> re-hits the abandoned poison-pills. PROOF: all 7 recurring change_ids are ABANDONED (Gerrit REST); VOTER_ERROR bursts map 1:1 to 'Uvicorn running' container restarts; per-day counts jump to 52 on 07-03 (auto-deploy day); 13 more errors on 07-07 incl one during this investigation (NOT recovered). IMPACT: no legitimate open-change vote was dropped (open changes vote fine; only abandoned changes 409) — the metric/alarm is polluted, the gate was never actually stalled. DEFECT (violates reconcile.py:1-10 purpose + voter_errors semantics in observability.sh:96-100). FIX (code): skip changes whose status is not open in reconcile; treat 409 'change is closed' as terminal (record, no retry, no voter_errors increment). FIX (infra): persistent mount for /var/gerrit/site/reviewbot. Implementing the code fix next (RED->GREEN).
